message:
fix(web): compression middleware no longer clobbers existing Vary header

The compression success path used `headers.insert("vary", ...)` which
replaced any pre-existing Vary value (e.g. "origin") set by the inner
handler. Switch to `append_vary_token()` which preserves existing values.

Added regression test (gated on `compression` feature).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
